---
id: get-lines-by-counterparty
title: "Get credit lines by counterparty"
description: "Returns all credit lines granted to the specified counterparty, regardless of status."
sidebar_label: "Get credit lines by counterparty"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get credit lines by counterparty"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/credit/lines/counterparty/{counterpartyId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all credit lines granted to the specified counterparty, regardless of status.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
